entities.description: Annual precipitation of less than 450 mm with a 40-80% coefficient of variation

entities.name: ARIDITY
entities.description: Severe lack of moisture in the environment

entities.description: A state where water loss exceeds water gain

entities.name: DESERTIFICATION
entities.description: The process by which fertile land becomes desert

entities.description: Human populations exerting pressure on natural resources

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animal populations exerting pressure on natural resources

entities.name: ARABLE CROPPING
entities.description: The cultivation of land for crops, noted as not dependable alone in drylands

entities.name: DRYLANDS

entities.description: Livestock assets that provide sustainable support to livelihoods

entities.name: WATER RECYCLING
